chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 524 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 01-10-2025 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. This Petition was filed in the year, 2018 and it was lastly fixed in Court on 27-10-2022. Thereafter, no such concrete efforts were taken either by the Petitioner or his Counsel to get the matter fixed in Court for further proceedings and since then the matter is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same vigilantly. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
